title: Air Wick Reed Diffuser Multipack, Cherry Blossom Scent, Pack of 5 x 25 ml, 6 Weeks of Long-Lasting Freshness, Elegant Home Decor, Neutralizes Odors, Enhances Room Ambiance, Air Freshener
features: CREATE A WELCOMING ATMOSPHERE: Bright, ripe essence of Cherry Blossom for lifting any room in the house

INFUSED WITH ESSENTIAL OILS: Surround yourself in the inviting scents of our nature-inspired fragrances, infused with natural essential oils which neutralise malodours in the kitchen, bathroom and living room
NATURE INSPIRED: Airwick Reed Diffusers use natural rattan stems to delicately diffuse wonderful long-lasting fragrance and improve your home fragrance for up to 6 weeks
LONG LASTING FRAGRANCE FOR UP TO 6 WEEKS: Scented liquid included in bottle lasts up to six weeks
Available in other fragrances, Recycle when empty
description: Product Description Air Wick Reed Diffuser uses naturally derived rattan stems to delicately diffuse wonderful fragrances. Create a welcoming atmosphere in your home with its natural fragrance experience and elegant design. Air Wick Reed Diffusers help to rid of odours whilst providing an amazing fragrance experience to enjoy every day with your favourite fragrance. Ingredients CONTAINS; 3-butoxypropan-2-Ol, Distillates (petroleum), hydrotreated light, 2-T-BUTYLCYCLOHEXYL ACETATE, TETRAHYDROLINALOOL, PHENETHYL ALCOHOL, 2,4-DIMETHYL-3-CYCLOHEXENE CARBOXALDEHYDE, LINALYL ACETATE, 2,6-DIMETHYL-7-OCTEN-2-OL, CITRONELLOL, ISOPROPYLPHENYLBUTANAL, GAMMA-UNDECALACTONE, AMYL CINNAMAL, 3-(4-isobutyl-2-methylphenyl) propanal, ALLYL HEPTANOATE, 4-METHYL-3-DECEN-5-OL, alpha-iso-Methylionone, 2,6-Dimethyl-5-heptenal , ISOEUGENOL, Piperonal, delta-1-(2,6,6-Trimethyl3-cyclohexen-1-yl)-2-buten-1-one, Limonene
